description: On daemon startup (daemon run entry point), detect workflows in 'running' status whose phase agents are not actually running. For each orphaned workflow: check if the agent-runner has an active agent for that workflow's run ID. If not, either reset the workflow phase to allow re-execution, or cancel the workflow and reset the task to 'ready'. This handles the scenario where the daemon crashes mid-execution and restarts — currently these workflows get stuck in 'running' forever with no agent. The reconcile_stale flag partially addresses this but doesn't check agent process liveness.
title: Add startup detection of orphaned running workflows and automatic recovery
